cadence: annual, rolling as late filers report (~18-month lag typical)
caveats: Self-reported by counties and 'posted as submitted' — the State Controller does not audit or restate these figures.
Category level only: there is no vendor detail here, and most counties publish no vendor-level checkbook anywhere.
Fiscal years appear as the ending year (2024 = FY2023-24); late-filing counties can be a year behind their peers.
57 counties appear here, not 58: the City and County of San Francisco reports through the cities dataset instead.

not_in_this_dataset: San Francisco (city-county; files through the cities dataset)
